name: Green Beans Almondine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and cut off their ends. Place them in a deep, 2-quart heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole with water.
2. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 10 to 12 minutes or until the beans are crisp-tender. Drain the beans.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the drained green beans.
4. Stir to combine.
5. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until the butter has melted and the beans are tender.
